topic: The backseat seatbelt of my car is buckled every morning and I drive alone
title: The Backseat Seatbelt of My Car Is Buckled Every Morning. I Drive Alone. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The backseat seatbelt of my car is buckled every morning. I drive alone.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a buckled rear seatbelt across an empty backseat of a parked car at dawn, the metal latch visible in the receiver, dim garage light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two thousand nineteen Honda Civic. One car. One driver.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a Honda Civic parked alone in an attached residential garage at night, no people visible, dim overhead bulb, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Park in the garage. Lock the car. Go inside.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a car key fob in a hand pressing the lock button beside a Honda Civic in a garage, only the hand visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Dropped my phone last March. Reached back. Hand hit the buckle.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hand reaching toward the back seat of a car between the front seats, only the hand visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Thought a friend had left it. None had been in the car for months.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an empty backseat of a car with one rear seatbelt visibly buckled across the cushion, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Unbuckled it. Locked the car. Went inside.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hand pressing the red release button on a rear seatbelt buckle, only the hand visible, dim car interior light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a rear car seatbelt fastened tightly across an empty backseat at dawn, the buckle clearly engaged, dim morning light through the windshield, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Set the dashcam to record overnight.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small dashcam mounted to a windshield with a small red recording light glowing, dim car interior at night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Footage shows an empty backseat. Audio captures a buckle clicking at three fourteen AM.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing dashcam footage of a darkened empty car interior with a waveform audio spike visible at the bottom of the screen, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week the belt was pulled tight. Like it was holding something heavy in place.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a rear car seatbelt drawn taut across an empty backseat cushion with the strap fully extended from the retractor, dim garage light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I park on the street now.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a Honda Civic parked on a quiet residential street at night under a streetlight, no people visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My dashcam now records the belt unbuckling at seven AM. The same time I leave for work every day.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing dashcam playback of a rear car seatbelt visibly releasing from its buckle with a timestamp reading seven zero zero AM, vertical 9:16 framing
